allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
fix: add STUN servers to WebRTC peer connection for NAT traversal

Configure RTCPeerConnection with the same STUN servers used by the
browser \(stun.l.google.com\). This enables the orchestrator-agent to
generate server reflexive \(srflx\) ICE candidates with public IPs,
fixing ICE connection failures when browser and orchestrator are
on the same network.

Previously, the orchestrator only generated host candidates \(local IPs\),
which couldn''t be reached by the browser due to VM network isolation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
fix: add STUN servers to WebRTC peer connection for NAT traversal

Configure ICE servers matching openplc-web to enable WebRTC connections
through NAT. Uses Google and Cloudflare STUN servers.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
